coverage_columns.cs_universe_count: Conservative row-level minimum of the non-null same-date full-panel group sizes across applicable transformed features.
coverage_columns.sector_universe_count: Conservative row-level minimum of the non-null same-date same-sector group sizes across applicable sector-relative transformed features.

known_caveats: Normalization is point-in-time safe with respect to time because only same-date values are used.
Sector metadata may be current vendor metadata, not a verified historical sector panel.
Universe membership and ticker identity must be interpreted using the dataset manifest for the selected vendor.
timing_assumption: End-of-day only. Same-date close/volume-based normalization is allowed because values are assumed known by the date close.
universe_definition: Equity panel present in the processed daily feature input on each date.
